prices_url.title: Prices URL
prices_url.description: URL to fetch current LLM prices from (JSON array format)

sync_interval_cron.title: Sync Interval (Cron)
sync_interval_cron.description: Cron expression for how often to sync prices (e.g. '0 */6 * * *' for every 6 hours)

auto_create_models.title: Auto-Create Models
auto_create_models.description: Automatically create new model price entries for models not yet in the system

vendor_filter.title: Vendor Filter
vendor_filter.description: Only sync prices for these vendors (platform slug or source name). Leave empty to sync all.

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: Log what would change without actually updating prices
